creator: public@troback.com
text:
After upgrade to 6.2 the Citrix ICA Client don't always start. In top
the process are maked as ptsopn. After some time, minutes, hours and
sometimes days, the program starts and works normaly. This problem
also occurred in the release cycle of 6.1 but disappear just before or
in the final release.

How-To-Repeat: Install the port net/citrix_ica and start wfcmgr

Note: I can't reproduce this at 100%! Sometimes the program starts and
sometimes it don't. Sometimes I can wait for hours and sometimes i just
minutes.
